items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in R
id: 98566771-0167-5ce5-a485-d2b8e4846ddb
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Ransomware Attacks (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RANSOMWARE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Ransomware Attacks
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/11
modified: 2026/06/11
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Ransomware Attacks — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-11T16:23:34Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Ransomware Attacks", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CISA Warns of Check Point Security Gateway Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Ransomware Attacks Exploitation Attempt - RANSOMWARE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"vssadmin"; nocase; content:"delete shadows"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3152434; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-11, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: Russian APTs Still Exploiting Patched WinRAR Flaw CVE-2025-8088
items.description: Despite a 2025 patch, Russian-linked groups still exploit a WinRAR flaw (CVE-2025-8088) to deploy malware via phishing archives. CVE-2025-8088 is a path traversal flaw in WinRAR that lets an attacker write files outside the extraction directory using NTFS Alternate Data Streams. WinRAR fixed it in version 7.13 in July 2025. Nearly a year later, Trend […]
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] Threat Intel advisory. Risk score 7.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.
